arts.ttl: 'Made contact': Chelsea have opened talks with Premier League rivals to sign 'incredible' player - journalist
Chelsea rule out Benoît Badiashile departure, despite elite-level interest
arts.sum: Benoît Badiashile (23) has made 10 starts for Chelsea this season, however, only two of those have come in the Premier League. Six have come in the UEFA Europa Conference…

arts.ttl: Astana vs Chelsea - Europa Conference League: Live score, team news and updates as Enzo Maresca's kids to face Kazakhstan side in extreme -13C weather
arts.sum: Follow Mail Sport's live blog for the latest team news, updates and live score from the Europa Conference League clash between Chelsea and Astana at the Pavlodar Central Stadium.

arts.ttl: £60m Todd Boehly drama could be about to get much worse as Chelsea to give big clue in next few days
Chelsea transfer news: Blues 'prepared to pay' Franco Mastantuono release clause
arts.sum: Chelsea are allegedly prepared to pay the release clause of Franco Mastantuono in an effort to fend off rivals for the River Plate youngster's signature.

arts.ttl: The Chelsea players who could debut against Astana
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca has named a large group of academy players in his squad to face Astana in the UEFA Conference League this afternoon. The clash is Chelsea’s furthest-ever European away trip and Maresca has opted to leave the bulk of his big hitters at home. arts.ttl: Transfer increasingly likely: Arsenal, Liverpool & Chelsea willing to rescue underrated star
arts.sum: Aurelien Tchouameni reportedly looks increasingly likely to leave Real Madrid at the end of this season, with Arsenal, Liverpool and Chelsea among his transfer suitors. Tchouameni has been linked with Liverpool for around €60m in a recent report from Sky’s Sacha Tavolieri, and now there’s been a further update on the France international’s future. According […] The post Transfer increasingly likely: Arsenal, Liverpool & Chelsea willing to rescue underrated star appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Chelsea have three of the five most accurate long passers in the Premier League this season
“He’s not normal” – Chelsea star praised for Tottenham display, would have been in Golden Generation
arts.sum: Chelsea midfielder Roméo Lavia would have been in Belgium’s Golden Generation if he’d been born earlier. That’s according to analyst Filip Joos, via Voetbal Primeur, who was left very impressed by the midfielder’s display in the 4-3 win over Tottenham.
